title: Assessing the role of green finance and education as new determinants of sustainable development in China
claim_summary: Green finance and educational investment are significant positive determinants of sustainable development outcomes in Chinese provinces, based on panel data regression analysis covering 2010-2022.
stated_reason: The investigation was not able to determine whether all authors, editors, or reviewers were aware of or involved in the misconduct, but this misconduct was significant enough to determine that the scientific integrity of the article cannot be guaranteed. In adherence to the recommendations of the Committee on Publication Ethics (COPE), the article is retracted.
selection_method: PMC retraction notice search, Frontiers in Psychology 2026. Surfaced via PMC article PMC12369491. Low fame: niche economics-psychology interface, no mainstream press coverage. Selection bias disclosure: Frontiers journals have elevated retraction rates; this entry is representative of that publisher category, not of green finance literature broadly. Non-neuroscience scope as requested.
corpus_scope: Green finance and sustainable development claims in Chinese provincial economics literature, Frontiers journals 2024-2026
